code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut sorted = true
  mut token = ""
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        else
          is_ws = false
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if have_prev
            if v < prev
              sorted = false
            end
          end
          prev = v
          have_prev = true
        when None
          sorted = false
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        token = token
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sorted
    print("YES")
  else
    print("NO")
  end
end
